user.title: Find Medisana BS430
user.description: Wake the scale by completing a weighing, keep VitaDock disconnected, then submit to search again.

confirm.title: Add Medisana BS430
confirm.description: Set up the discovered scale {name} at {address}.

data_description.name: The name used for this scale in Home Assistant.

error.device_not_found: The scale was not found. Complete a weighing and try again while the scale is still awake.

abort.no_discovery_info: Bluetooth discovery information is no longer available.

init.title: Link scale profiles to people
init.description: Enter a person name for each profile that is in use. Profile 1 remains available for backward compatibility. Additional profile entities are created after a name is configured.

data_description.profile_name_2: Enter a name to create entities for profile 2.
data_description.profile_name_3: Enter a name to create entities for profile 3.
data_description.profile_name_4: Enter a name to create entities for profile 4.
data_description.profile_name_5: Enter a name to create entities for profile 5.
data_description.profile_name_6: Enter a name to create entities for profile 6.
data_description.profile_name_7: Enter a name to create entities for profile 7.
data_description.profile_name_8: Enter a name to create entities for profile 8.
